name: com.oddsockets.unity
description:
Realtime messaging for Unity: pub/sub channels, presence, and a full enhanced-feature surface (reactions, threads, typing indicators, read receipts, direct messages, notifications). Backed by the OddSockets managed worker fleet.

OddSockets - A division of Tyga.Cloud Ltd

author.name: OddSockets - A division of Tyga.Cloud Ltd

samples.description: Connect, subscribe to a channel, and publish a message.
Two independent clients proving an end-to-end publish/subscribe round trip through the worker.
